query: INSERT INTO agent_configs (user_id, agent_type, agent_name, is_enabled, learning_rate, stop_loss_pct, take_profit_pct) SELECT u.id, 'RL', 'RL-Agent-1', 0, '0.001', '0.05', '0.1' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'RL', 'RL-Agent-2', 0, '0.001', '0.05', '0.1' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'RL', 'RL-Agent-3', 0, '0.001', '0.05', '0.1' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'Momentum', 'Momentum-Agent', 0, '0.0005', '0.08', '0.15' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'MeanReversion', 'MeanReversion-Agent', 0, '0.0008', '0.06', '0.12' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'DeepSeek', 'DeepSeek-LLM-Agent', 0, '0.001', '0.04', '0.2' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AZZAHwzL8CcpFVy.root --database Pbyi2wUKSGy94X9zGceg7e --execute INSERT INTO agent_configs (user_id, agent_type, agent_name, is_enabled, learning_rate, stop_loss_pct, take_profit_pct) SELECT u.id, 'RL', 'RL-Agent-1', 0, '0.001', '0.05', '0.1' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'RL', 'RL-Agent-2', 0, '0.001', '0.05', '0.1' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'RL', 'RL-Agent-3', 0, '0.001', '0.05', '0.1' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'Momentum', 'Momentum-Agent', 0, '0.0005', '0.08', '0.15' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'MeanReversion', 'MeanReversion-Agent', 0, '0.0008', '0.06', '0.12' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%' UNION ALL SELECT u.id, 'DeepSeek', 'DeepSeek-LLM-Agent', 0, '0.001', '0.04', '0.2' FROM users u WHERE u.name LIKE '%RADOSŁAW%' OR u.name LIKE '%B3STIA%';
